preconditions: Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting the workflow.

testCases.title: Verify Home page guest state opens and Login page is accessed through the person/profile button
steps: Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state and no authenticated user identity is visible.
Click the person/profile button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and interactive after opening from Home page
steps: Verify the Login button is enabled and clickable.
Verify the Back button and Home button are visible and clickable.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page opens successfully and the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and interactive.

testCases.title: Verify password entry is masked while typing credentials
steps: Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Type Carwash#1 into the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters during input and does not display the plain text password value.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication returns the user to authenticated Home page state
steps: Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user, returns to the Home page in authenticated state, and displays authenticated user identity information together with authenticated-only feature areas.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and password combination displays generic Failed message and keeps user unauthenticated
steps: Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter InvalidPass#1 in the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the application does not transition to authenticated Home state, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only generic Failed message
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page or equivalent unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify submission with Username populated and Password blank fails authentication
steps: Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify submission with Password populated and Username blank fails authentication
steps: Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing whitespace handling for valid credentials
steps: Enter space followed by krisadmin followed by space in the Username field.
Enter space followed by Carwash#1 followed by space in the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles leading and trailing whitespace according to implemented business behavior and the resulting authentication outcome is consistently observable without exposing unexpected validation messages.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only credential submission fails with generic Failed message
steps: Enter only whitespace characters into the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns user to Home page without authentication
steps: Verify the Login page is open.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns user to Home page without authentication
steps: Verify the Login page is open.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify generic Failed message consistency across invalid credential scenarios
steps: Submit invalid credentials and observe the error message.
Submit blank credentials and observe the error message.
Submit partial credentials and observe the error message.
testCases.expectedResult: Each authentication failure scenario displays the same generic Failed message and does not display separate required-field validation messaging.

testCases.title: Verify user remains unauthenticated after failed login and can still navigate back to Home page
steps: After the failure message appears, click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state after failed authentication and authenticated-only UI is not visible.
